NOTICE OF RULING GRANTING PETITION TO CONFIRM ARB AWARD & ENTER JUDGMNT THEREON FILED BY PETITIONERS

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: CONFIRMATION OF AWARD AS FOLLOWS: RESPONDENT RONALD PARTRIDGE'S CLAIMS ARE DISMISSED IN THEIR ENTIRETY. ALL REFERENCES TO THE ARBITRATION ARE TO BE EXPUNGED FROM ANTHONY CAMERON'S REGISTRATION RECORDS MAINTAINED BY THE NASD CENTRAL REGISTRATION DEPOSITORY. ALL OTHER RELIEF REQUESTED AND NOT EXPRESSLY GRANTED IS DENIED. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT (NO SASE - 302 OUTBOX)
